scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.docker:db:migrate: docker compose run --rm app sh -lc "pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @skylight-diy/db db:migrate"
scripts.docker:db:seed: docker compose run --rm app sh -lc "pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @skylight-diy/db db:seed"
scripts.docker:setup: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose run --rm app sh -lc "pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @skylight-diy/db db:migrate && pnpm --filter @skylight-diy/db db:seed"
